items.q: How do I book a consultation?
items.a: You can book a consultation through our contact page or by calling us directly.
We primarily serve Dubai and the surrounding Emirates.

items.q: Can I customize my wedding package?
items.a: Yes! Use our Package Builder tool to create a custom experience.

config.title: Still need help?

pages.title: Trust & Safety
pages.description: Your safety and trust are our top priorities at YA Wedding.

config.content:
## Our Commitment

At YA Wedding, we ensure that every vendor and service provider meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety.

### Verified Vendors
All our partners are thoroughly vetted to ensure they provide the luxury experience you expect.

### Secure Payments
We use industry-standard encryption for all financial transactions.

pages.title: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms and conditions for using YA Wedding services.

config.content:
## 1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

## 2. Service Description
YA Wedding provides event planning and management services in Dubai.

## 3. Booking and Cancellations
Specific booking terms apply to each service and package. Please refer to your individual contract for details.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.description: How we handle and protect your personal data at YA Wedding.

config.title: Privacy Policy
config.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us.

config.content:
## Data Collection
We collect information that you provide directly to us when you book a service or contact us.

## Use of Information
We use your information to provide and improve our services, and to communicate with you about your events.

## Data Protection
We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.

pages.title: Partnerships
pages.description: Collaborate with Dubai's leading luxury wedding planner.

config.content:
## Why Partner with Us?
YA Wedding is at the forefront of the luxury event industry in Dubai. We are always looking for exceptional vendors and creative partners.

## How to Apply
If you are a vendor or service provider interested in collaborating, please reach out via our contact form with your portfolio.

config.title: Ready to Partner?
config.subtitle: Join our network of elite wedding professionals.

pages.title: Return and Refund
pages.description: Our policy on returns and refunds for services and rentals.

config.title: Return and Refund
config.subtitle: Clear policies for your peace of mind.

config.content:
## Service Cancellations
Cancellations made more than 30 days before the event date may be eligible for a partial refund of the deposit.

## Rental Returns
All rental items must be returned in their original condition. Damages may incur additional charges.

## Refund Process
Approved refunds are processed within 14 business days to the original payment method.
